description_long: This is a rectangular, modern ceramic sink with a deep basin and thick, squared edges. The sink features a single, large basin with a central drain hole and a smaller circular hole on the rear deck, likely for faucet installation. The surface is smooth, glossy, and white, giving it a clean and contemporary appearance suitable for urban public restrooms or commercial spaces. The front and sides are solid and unadorned, while the rear deck is slightly raised to accommodate plumbing fixtures. The overall construction appears robust and heavy, typical of high-quality ceramic sinks. There are no visible faucets or overflow holes present.
description: A modern, rectangular white ceramic sink with a deep basin, central drain, and a smooth glossy finish. It features a thick, squared design and a rear deck with a faucet hole.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the basin and the thick, squared edge; the faucet hole is visible on the rear deck.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, deep basin and the clean, unadorned front face.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the basin depth and the rear deck with faucet hole.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the solid back and the central drain opening within the basin.
